text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
So that's how the legend got started. They say
that seein' the zashiki-warashi at the inn is a good
omen.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Is that so? What an interesting story!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Yukino... That doesn't scare you at all?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Not really? The wild boar and deer are much
more of a problem in ma hometown.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
And there's so many rivers an' trees that've been
there for who knows how long. Maybe I've always
been close to some strange things.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
So mysterious presences in the great swath of
nature... That sounds great.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Friends with nature? Sounds like Yukino for sure!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
After all, we were together in the woods behind
the academy yesterday and ended up seeing tons
of white kittens, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Hm? I mean, I was runnin' by mahself yesterday...
